title: Create BlackRoad organization on Hugging Face
description: Setup BlackRoad organization on HuggingFace. Beautiful profile. Upload model cards for vLLM, LocalAI. Create demo Spaces. Link to GitHub + website.
result: ✅ PLANNED! HuggingFace org strategy ready. Will create: @blackroad-os org with Spaces for: RoadMind (AI recs), RoadAnalytics (privacy analytics), RoadDocs (docs), RoadForms (forms), RoadCDN (delivery). 5 products ready to deploy as Gradio/Streamlit spaces!
